title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Surat. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners:
AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners!
